0.text: Diffuse pleuroparenchymal density increases in the right lung upper lobe posteriorly, the middle lobe laterally, and the lower lobes, as well as the left lung upper lobe anteriorly, and the lower lobe posterobasal and mediobasal segments

1.text: Atelectatic changes in the right lung upper lobe posteriorly, the middle lobe laterally, and the lower lobes, as well as the left lung upper lobe anteriorly, and the lower lobe posterobasal and mediobasal segments

2.text: Superimposed ground glass densities in the right lung upper lobe posteriorly, the middle lobe laterally, and the lower lobes, as well as the left lung upper lobe anteriorly, and the lower lobe posterobasal and mediobasal segments

3.text: Bronchiectatic changes with associated fibrosis in the anterior segment of the left upper lobe

4.text: Subcentimeter pulmonary nodules in both lungs
